texto: There is no substantive difference between being stabbed to death in the living beating heart with a physical knife and feeling the plunging stabbing pain of betrayal.
explicacao: Citação de Keith Aaron Gilbert sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “There is no substantive difference between being stabbed to death in the living beating heart wit…” articula amor, betrayal, pain em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e pain.

frase_original: There is no substantive difference between being stabbed to death in the living beating heart with a physical knife and feeling the plunging stabbing pain of betrayal.

texto: The narcissist, cut off from her spirituality, is one who spends unquantifiable energy supporting and maintaining and utterly and completely fake self, in denial of one's true self, trading it for glamour to compensate for a core of being that is simply wracked,a deep dark cold void; using and abusing others to maintain and sustain the false state. this fake self is contrived in absentia from the connectivity that even the most unaware take for granted. The narcissist doesn't see other human beings.
explicacao: Citação de Keith Aaron Gilbert sobre temas ligados a fe. “The narcissist, cut off from her spirituality, is one who spends unquantifiable energy supporting…” articula fe, abuse, denial em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao-noturna.
